goal: Phase 5 graph production audit — SEP-anchored content fitness review across 12 evidence sessions per the master-plan gate report at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (S-0081 gate PROCEED recommendation; per-subdomain density 35%). Each evidence session produces candidate findings only; closeout disposition is interactive (not in this routine target).

tasks.name: Cross-bridge full census (71 edges) — SEP-anchored review of every cross-domain edge; calibration-set whose defect rate triggers within-session sample expansion for downstream subdomain tasks
Epistemology subdomain audit — 25 of 72 edges (35%); ~12 edge-anchored nodes; SEP-anchored review per master-plan prompt template
Ethics subdomain audit — 24 of 68 edges (35%); ~12 edge-anchored nodes
Metaphysics subdomain audit — 23 of 66 edges (35%); ~12 edge-anchored nodes
Philosophy of mind subdomain audit — 25 of 70 edges (35%); ~12 edge-anchored nodes

Philosophy of science subdomain audit — 11 of 30 edges (35%); ~8 edge-anchored nodes
Political philosophy subdomain audit — 12 of 34 edges (35%); ~8 edge-anchored nodes

Hubs 1–5 (top 5 by total degree, full-incident-edge review): epistemic_justification (epistemology, deg 14), existence (metaphysics, 11), propositional_knowledge (epistemology, 11), causation (metaphysics, 10), physicalism (mind, 10) — ~48 unique incident edges. Per-edge SEP-anchored verdict + reasoning + confidence per master-plan §T1-A prompt template; per-node review on the 5 hub nodes themselves. Decomposed from former AUDIT-HT at the S-0117 administrative close per Issue #58 (the original single-task scope of 96 edges + 10 nodes + 3 traces hit context cap mid-authoring at S-0117).

Hubs 6–10 (classical_logic (logic, deg 9), meaning (language, 9), normative_ethics (ethics, 9), vienna_circle_logical_positivism (service, 9), aristotelian_four_causes (service, 8) — ~48 unique incident edges) + 3 syllabus traces (gettier_problem (epistemology, BFS depth 4, 11 nodes), modal_realism (metaphysics, depth 5, 8 nodes), social_contract_theory (political philosophy, depth 3, 6 nodes — substituted for absent free_speech per S-0081 gate)). Per master-plan §T1-A prompt template; per master-plan §"Three diagnostic syllabus traces". Sequential after AUDIT-HT-1 (depends_on AUDIT-HT-1) so two routine fires don't race to author both halves.
